feat.critical_success: The target takes a –2 status penalty to attack rolls against creatures other than you until the beginning of your next turn.
feat.name: Gunpowder Gauntlet
feat.requirement: You're wielding a loaded one-handed firearm.
feat.success: The target takes a –1 status penalty to attack rolls against creatures other than you until the beginning of your next turn.
feat.text: Your flair keeps foes' attention, as your motions with your gun draw your foes into a deadly game. As you toy with them and performatively brandish your weapon, you build their tunnel vision, leaving them trapped in a perceptual gauntlet of your own making. Attempt a Performance check against the Will DC of a single target within your one-handed firearm's first range increment.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
